form.formComment: Won two starts back over 340m at this track. Last start he finished 3rd over 340m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (19.88) behind Maybe Yes in a Grade 5 on April 11. Draw likely to suit. Expected to go very well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Squid Worth beaten 6 lengths (20.49). Looks a solid contender.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Most recently finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Squid Worth beaten 6 lengths (20.49). Looks a solid contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Was awkwardly placed on heels and carried wider over the concluding stages.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (19.84) at this track over 340m. Looks a strong winning hope.

formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early sectional but bumped into one better when runner up (19.84) at this track over 340m. Looks a strong winning hope.

form.formComment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last four starts, the latest when third (20.03) at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.comment: Racing well without winning, filling the minors at her last four starts, the latest when third (20.03) at this track. Will need a little luck early from the draw. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 3.5 lengths in 19.80, beating Sammy's Beach. Last start finished 5th on April 4 over 340m at this track behind Zipping Klimenko beaten 3.5 lengths (20.28) in a Grade 5. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: Made a winning debut over 340m at this track where he settled on speed and went on to score a 1.5 lengths win 19.86. Returned in winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.comment: Made a winning debut over 340m at this track where he settled on speed and went on to score a 1.5 lengths win 19.86. Returned in winning form and can go on with it.

form.formComment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 520m at Wentworth Park. Rates among the chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Returns from a three-and-a-half months spell and hit the frame when last resuming, finishing second over 520m at Wentworth Park. Rates among the chances this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room at the end of the back, came together and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Finished third last start (17.73) at big odds over 300m at Taree Super Track. Drawn wide. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at this track but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Will need the breaks to go her way.
